Uses of Interface
ui.interaction.MouseInteractionStrategy

Packages that use MouseInteractionStrategy
Package
Description
ui.interaction
 

  • Uses of MouseInteractionStrategy in ui.interaction

    Classes in ui.interaction that implement MouseInteractionStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CloseButtonStrategy
    A mouse interaction strategy that closes a Subwindow when the close button is clicked.
    class 
    DragStrategy
    A strategy that allows the user to drag a Subwindow by its title bar.
    class 
    EditAnySubwindowStrategy
    Generic strategy for delegating mouse interactions to any editable subwindow.
    class 
    OpenTableStrategy
    A MouseInteractionStrategy that opens a new TableDesignSubwindow when the user double-clicks on a table name in a TableSubwindow.
    class 
    ResizeStrategy
    A MouseInteractionStrategy that allows a user to resize a subwindow by dragging its borders or corners.
    class 
    ScrollInteractionStrategy
     
    Constructor parameters in ui.interaction with type arguments of type MouseInteractionStrategy
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    MouseInteractionDispatcher(List<MouseInteractionStrategy> strategies)
